calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 crystallization-necessity retest (HARNESS-FIXED, startup-assertion-gated): real REINFORCE on gated_policy (Phases 0-2) + stepped expansion_parameters() optimizer post-crystallize (Phase 3) + residue_field.ewc_penalty() summed into the Phase-3 loss. 2-arm/3-seed, IGW-023 Phase-3 pressure. Supersedes 610d (untrained-policy no-op).
items.note: Wires the three prescriptions 610c/610d dropped, each verified by a MANDATORY startup assertion (_assert_fixes_wired) that ERRORs the run if any is missing: (1) FIX1 -- the gated_policy is the behavioral policy; a real REINFORCE update (stored log_probs -> discounted returns -> mean-baseline advantages -> policy_loss.backward() -> policy_optimizer.step() on gated_policy params) trains it in Phases 0-2; the assertion proves trained selected-action entropy drops below the untrained band (<1.04 of ln5=1.609), i.e. NOT the 610c/610d near-uniform 1.06-1.12 no-op signature. (2) FIX2 -- after gated_policy.crystallize() fires at Phase-3 entry (ARM_1), the optimizer is rebuilt over expansion_parameters() and is actually stepped each Phase-3 episode. (3) FIX3 -- residue_field.ewc_penalty() (already lambda-scaled internally) is summed into the Phase-3 loss after snapshot_ewc_anchor(), with the residue rbf Parameters in the optimizer so the EWC pull is a non-vacuous protective step (EWC armed only in ARM_1 -> returns 0 in ARM_0). Manifest records n_policy_steps / n_expansion_steps_phase3 / n_ewc_terms_phase3 / ewc_penalty_last so a reviewer can confirm all three fired without reading the script. Pre-registered substrate-ceiling fork (docstring grid row c): a VERIFIABLY-TRAINED non-uniform policy whose ARM_0 control still does NOT collapse STRENGTHENS MECH-341/MECH-313 (diversity preservation robust) and does NOT weaken INV-074. ~13h cloud run (610d actual ~13h on ree-cloud-2).
